title: stelis ramificans
intro: Stelis ramificans is a species of orchid native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique branching habit and delicate white flowers. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis ramificans include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts can be used to create topical creams, infusions, and tinctures that harness its medicinal properties.
